meta.tagline: You choose. We handle the rest.

auth.loginHint: Sign in to your ZRIK account to manage trips, offers and bookings.
auth.loginTimeout: Sign-in took too long. Please try again in a moment.
auth.loginFailed: Could not sign in. Check your connection and try again.
auth.authConfigError: Temporary authentication error. Refresh the page or try again.
auth.registerLead: Register to request trips or send offers as a driver.
auth.name: Full name
auth.emailNotVerified: Account pending — confirm your email (ACTIVATE ACCOUNT) before signing in.
auth.checkEmailLead: We sent an activation link to {email}. The account stays pending until you confirm.
auth.checkEmailStep1: Open the inbox for the email you used to register.
auth.checkEmailStep3: Then sign in with your email and password.

tripForm.title: Where are we going?
tripForm.lead: Tell us the essentials. Verified drivers handle the rest.
tripForm.scheduleHint: When you need us and the car category
tripForm.partyHint: So we can match the right vehicle
tripForm.dropoff: Where would you like to go?
tripForm.notesPlaceholder: Name sign, waiting time, child seat…
tripForm.scheduleHintPlanner: Recommended pickup is calculated by the planner — you can still adjust it.
tripForm.departureSynced: Synced with the planner. Edit if you prefer a different time.

tripPlanner.title: Plan my trip
tripPlanner.lead: Tell us when you need to arrive — we calculate the ideal departure.
tripPlanner.airportHint: We recommend arriving 2 h early (domestic) or 3 h early (international). You can change the buffer.
tripPlanner.needRoute: Enter origin and destination to build the plan.
tripPlanner.needArrival: Choose your desired arrival date and time.
tripPlanner.syncNote: Departure = desired arrival − {travel} min travel − {buffer} min buffer.
